TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Don_Asmonga, title = Don_Asmonga, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Don_Asmonga} }

S.FORM: Don Asmonga sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1928 , ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Don Asmonga, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Don Asmonga sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1928 , ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 2, Don Asmonga, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2014) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on as~ɕmoŋa s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *on as~ɕmoŋa, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
